seo.description: Johny William de Oliveira Alves, Senior Frontend Engineer with 20+ years of experience delivering scalable web apps in fintech, telecom, and consumer goods. Expert in React, Next.js, and TypeScript, driving 99.9% uptime and millions of users in high-impact projects for clients such as Coca-Cola and Anbima. Currently pursuing a Master’s in Computer Science, specialized in Deep Learning and AI, with a strong focus on mentorship and CI/CD automation to accelerate software delivery.
seo.headline: Senior Frontend Engineer | React & Next.js Specialist | Scalable SaaS Applications | Agile & CI/CD Advocate

coverLetter: As a passionate frontend developer with over 20 years of experience architecting scalable web solutions, I was excited to discover the [Position Name] role at [Company Name], whose commitment to innovative products deeply resonates with my professional background.
Having led high-impact projects for global brands like Coca-Cola and Anbima, I am eager to bring my expertise in the React/Next.js ecosystem and technical leadership to your engineering team.

Throughout my career, I have focused on delivering measurable business value through technical excellence. At Zarp Localiza, I led a complete technology restructuring that propelled the platform to #1 organic search rankings by optimizing Core Web Vitals and implementing advanced SSR strategies. During my tenure at CI&T, I architected a greenfield financial platform for Anbima and ensured 99.9% uptime for Coca-Cola’s promotional systems across 20+ countries during high-traffic global campaigns. More recently, at Seguralta and WeFit, I established scalable component libraries and modular architectures that significantly accelerated development velocity and ensured design consistency across multiple workstreams.

Beyond my technical contributions, I am a dedicated Tech Mentor and a Master’s candidate in Computer Science focused on Deep Learning and Artificial Intelligence (AI). I am particularly drawn to [Company Name]’s dedication to excellence, which aligns with my passion for fostering a high-performance culture through mentorship, rigorous code reviews, and the adoption of Agile/Scrum methodologies. I believe that my blend of deep engineering experience and continuous learning makes me an ideal fit to help [Company Name] scale its next generation of intelligent SaaS products.
I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills and 20+ years of experience can contribute to the continued success of [Company Name]. I am available at your convenience for a conversation.

list.role: Front-End Technical Lead | React & Next.js Specialist
highlights: • Front-End Technical Lead & Mentor: Delivered expert-led workshops on React, Next.js, and D3.js best practices, enabling cross-functional teams to build and maintain a trusted information hub for local store owners and players to discover and track regional events.

• Certification Platform: Architected a full-cycle certification management system (UI/UX to infrastructure) using React, Next.js, Node.js, and Contentful CMS, automating certificate issuance and progress tracking and eliminating manual administrative overhead.

• Event Platform: Engineered TCG RP, a scalable event platform with React and Next.js using a monorepo architecture and Contentful CMS, integrating a vendor admin area and WhatsApp bot for automated event tracking, reducing operational coordination time and improving attendee management efficiency.

list.role: Senior Front-End Engineer | React & Next.js Specialist
highlights: • Engineered a scalable front-end ecosystem and reusable component libraries using React, Next.js, and TypeScript, which accelerated development velocity by 36% and ensured 100% design consistency across all brokerage modules.

• Architected a high-performance brokerage management platform leveraging a hybrid Next.js architecture (SSR/CSR), resulting in a 36% improvement in page load times and a seamless, scalable experience for high-volume broker operations.

• Elevated engineering excellence by leading technical code reviews and mentoring junior developers in React and Next.js best practices, proactively mapping errors before user reports, establishing test suites to validate deliveries, and enabling rapid incident response that reduced time-to-fix across all brokerage modules.

• Designed high-impact analytical dashboards using Recharts, transforming complex financial datasets into real-time visual insights that empowered business stakeholders to make faster, data-driven strategic decisions.

list.role: Senior Front-End Technical Lead | React & Next.js Specialist
list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Architected and launched Seguralta Core, a comprehensive insurance brokerage platform built with React, Next.js, and FastAPI, providing franchisees with real-time access to commissions, renewals, and policy expiration data, streamlining critical business operations.

• Drove team growth by mentoring junior developers to independent delivery through structured code reviews and GitFlow practices, and established a continuous validation pipeline with ESLint, unit tests (Jest), and end-to-end tests (Cypress), eliminating regressions and ensuring release confidence.

• Engineered a robust quality and monitoring ecosystem: Integrated New Relic for performance monitoring, SonarQube for code quality analysis, and comprehensive testing (Jest, Testing Library, Cypress), while automating deployments with BitBucket Pipelines to optimize Core Web Vitals and ensure system reliability.

list.role: Senior Front-End Engineer | React & Next.js Specialist
highlights: • Architected and developed the front-end for CREA-SP's electronic ART platform, enabling engineering professionals across São Paulo to submit and manage Technical Responsibility Notes for works and services through a modern, intuitive digital interface.

• Designed and implemented a micro-frontend architecture using Module Federation within a monorepo, ensuring modularity, scalability, and the ability for multiple teams to develop and deploy features independently.
• Built reusable, type-safe components with React, Next.js, and TypeScript, establishing a solid foundation for continuous platform evolution and maintainability.
• Delivered a consistent, accessible UI library with Chakra UI, accelerating development and ensuring a professional, responsive user experience across all platform modules.
• Managed the full development lifecycle in Azure DevOps, including version control, CI/CD pipelines, and automated quality checks, ensuring reliable and efficient releases.

list.role: Senior Front-End Engineer | CI&T Client Delivery

clients.name: Anbima – Greenfield Platform Development
highlights: • Architected and launched a comprehensive financial data platform for Anbima from the ground up using React and Next.js, creating a modern system for collecting and publishing managed portfolio information with strict regulatory compliance.

• Implemented hybrid rendering strategies (SSR for SEO-critical financial content, CSR for interactive dashboards), improving page load times by ~60%, boosting Core Web Vitals scores, and increasing organic search visibility for financial product data.
• Designed reusable component libraries with React and TypeScript, ensuring consistency, maintainability, and rapid development of new features.
• Engineered robust data validation workflows and integrated with back-end APIs using optimized data fetching strategies to deliver real-time portfolio information.

clients.name: Coca-Cola – Platform Maintenance & Evolution
highlights: • Provided ongoing maintenance and multilingual support for Coca-Cola's promotional platforms across Latin America and the Caribbean, serving millions of users in 20+ countries within the Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) ecosystem.
• Managed multilingual content workflows in AEM, coordinating translations and regional adaptations for Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, Colombia, and Caribbean markets.
• Delivered critical production support during high-traffic promotional campaigns, ensuring rapid incident response, front-end fixes, and 99.9% uptime.
• Implemented front-end enhancements with Vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS to improve user experience, mobile responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility.
• Collaborated with AWS infrastructure teams and leveraged GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines for reliable multi-country deployments.

• Led the complete technology and infrastructure restructuring of the Zarp Localiza platform, migrating to React and Next.js to establish a modern, scalable architecture that improved developer productivity and platform performance.

• Drove SEO strategy to achieve #1 organic rankings: Implemented comprehensive optimizations including semantic HTML, structured data, Next.js SSR, and Core Web Vitals improvements that propelled the platform to top positions in organic search results, driving significant growth in organic traffic.

• Championed CI/CD adoption with Azure DevOps: Introduced and implemented automated build, test, and deployment pipelines in Azure DevOps, reducing release cycles, minimizing manual errors, and enabling rapid iteration on features and SEO enhancements.

• Optimized user experience and the sales funnel: Leveraged Hotjar (heatmaps, session recordings) and Datadog (performance monitoring) to analyze user behavior, identify friction points, and implement UX improvements that positively impacted conversion rates.

• Selected and standardized front-end technologies: Led the technology selection process, establishing React, Next.js, and TypeScript as the core stack, ensuring code quality, reusability, and long-term maintainability across the platform.

• Engineered full-stack features for the Invillia Apps Suite, a platform designed to optimize team management and remote work, spanning front-end (React, TypeScript, Redux, D3.js) and back-end (Node.js, Express, MySQL).
• Engineered integration with Microsoft Teams, enabling seamless access to team management tools, attendance tracking, and productivity metrics within the corporate communication platform.
• Optimized memory usage across React components and Redux state management, profiling and refactoring to eliminate leaks and improve stability for long-running remote work sessions.
• Built interactive data visualizations with D3.js, creating dashboards that displayed team performance, productivity trends, and resource allocation to support data-driven management decisions.
• Designed and delivered RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, ensuring reliable data delivery from optimized MySQL databases to front-end applications.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Delivered a unified digital experience for healthcare beneficiaries: Led the development of a portal that consolidated financial management, exam scheduling, and appointment booking, empowering patients to manage their healthcare needs in one place.
• Improved security and user access: Implemented a robust authentication API with Java and Spring Boot, ensuring secure access to sensitive health and financial data for thousands of beneficiaries.

• Enabled proactive system monitoring: Deployed Grafana dashboards that provided real-time visibility into system health, API performance, and user activity, reducing mean time to detection (MTTD) for incidents.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Managed and developed a web and mobile back-office platform for tracking promoters at retail locations, building React Native mobile applications for field staff and ASP.NET MVC web dashboards for operations teams.

• Delivered data visualization dashboards for JBS: Designed interactive dashboards that tracked promoter performance and retail results, enabling JBS stakeholders to monitor KPIs and make data-driven decisions in real-time.

• Engineered ETL processes for partner data integration: Developed and maintained Pentaho ETL pipelines to load, transform, and integrate partner data into SQL databases, ensuring comprehensive reporting and analytics.

• Maintained end-to-end data infrastructure: Supported the entire data lifecycle from ETL processing to dashboard visualization, ensuring data accuracy, reliability, and timely availability for business intelligence.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil

clients.name: Toyota Rodobens – Recall Customer Service Automation
highlights: • Led process automation and chatbot development for Toyota Rodobens recall campaigns using WDG Automation and Bizagi BPMN Modeler, streamlining customer notifications, appointment scheduling, and follow-up communications

• Structured end-to-end customer service projects for recall management, mapping optimized workflows that improved coordination, reduced manual effort, and enhanced the customer experience for affected vehicle owners
• Implemented RPA solutions that automated repetitive tasks, ensuring timely communication with vehicle owners and improving recall campaign effectiveness.

clients.name: Claro – Telemarketing Chrome Extension
highlights: • Engineered a custom Google Chrome extension using JavaScript for Claro telemarketing teams, automating customer lookup, call logging, and data entry tasks.
• Boosted agent productivity by reducing manual work and enabling faster access to customer information, allowing agents to focus on customer engagement and increasing call efficiency.
• Integrated the extension with existing telemarketing systems and CRM tools, ensuring seamless data synchronization and workflow continuity across platforms.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Provided maintenance, support, and continuous development for a comprehensive ERP and CRM system built with Delphi and Microsoft SQL Server, serving fiscal control, accounting, financial management, and real estate portfolio operations.
• Ensured system reliability and business continuity through proactive maintenance, timely bug fixes, and responsive user support, minimizing downtime and disruptions to critical business functions.
• Delivered new features and modules across multiple domains, adapting the system to evolving business requirements in fiscal compliance, financial reporting, and real estate portfolio tracking.
• Optimized Microsoft SQL Server databases, designing efficient stored procedures, indexes, and queries to ensure fast data access, data integrity, and accurate reporting.
• Maintained and enhanced legacy Delphi code, balancing stability with performance improvements and new functionality to extend the system's useful life.

• Ensured full regulatory and legal compliance across contract and fiscal modules, adapting the system to evolving Brazilian tax regulations and real estate legal requirements, supporting business operations without compliance incidents.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Engineered tax compliance automation services for multiple clients using Windows Forms and .NET C#.
• Created intuitive desktop applications that simplified complex fiscal workflows, reducing manual effort.
• Designed and maintained SQL Server databases for secure storage and fast access to client tax data.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Maintained and optimized a specialized distributor management ERP using Progress 4GL, ensuring operational stability.
• Engineered and deployed core financial and tax compliance modules, automating complex fiscal reporting workflows.
• Provided high-level technical support and system enhancements to guarantee business continuity for clients.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Engineered a robust ERP solution for the optical industry, enhancing inventory and financial workflows.
• Optimized SQL Server database design and modular Delphi development for mission-critical retail operations.
• Directed full-cycle system deployments and migrations, significantly reducing client onboarding time.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Engineered and optimized mission-critical ERP systems using Delphi and Firebird, ensuring 100% regulatory compliance.
• Spearheaded end-to-end ERP deployments, managing requirements gathering, system configuration, and user training.
• Architected versatile data solutions, including a specialized tool for the Police Department to enhance public safety operations.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: • Provided consulting and development services for tax compliance, creating custom Delphi and Firebird applications.
• Engineered fiscal file generation systems that automated complex tax calculations and ensured regulatory compliance.
• Customized solutions tailored to each client's specific tax obligations and workflows, enhancing user adoption and integration.
